statement.informal: `right_wheel_torque` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (abs(total_drive_torque) <= TORQUE_MAX ∧ abs(desired_yaw_moment) <= YAW_MOMENT_MAX ∧ track_width >= TRACK_MIN ∧ track_width <= TRACK_MAX ∧ rolling_radius >= RADIUS_MIN ∧ rolling_radius <= RADIUS_MAX), the function's result satisfies (True). This is the obligation Forge ships to a Lean target for DO-178C / IEC-61508 / ISO-26262 certification evidence.
statement.formal_lean:
-- @verify obligation pulled from torque_vectoring.eml
-- theorem right_torque_complements_left : ∀ args, (abs(total_drive_torque) <= TORQUE_MAX ∧ abs(desired_yaw_moment) <= YAW_MOMENT_MAX ∧ track_width >= TRACK_MIN ∧ track_width <= TRACK_MAX ∧ rolling_radius >= RADIUS_MIN ∧ rolling_radius <= RADIUS_MAX) → (True) := sorry
